scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client-app start"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client-app run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.test:e2e:prod:smoke: cross-env E2E_BASE_URL=https://condoos-ten.vercel.app E2E_API_URL=https://condoos-api.fly.dev/api E2E_WORKERS=1 E2E_HAS_LLM=1 playwright test e2e/i18n.spec.ts e2e/intent-smoke.spec.ts e2e/ui-smoke.spec.ts --project=desktop
scripts.test:e2e:prod:ui: cross-env E2E_BASE_URL=https://condoos-ten.vercel.app E2E_API_URL=https://condoos-api.fly.dev/api E2E_WORKERS=1 playwright test e2e/intent-smoke.spec.ts e2e/ui-walkthrough.spec.ts --project=desktop
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
scripts.e2e:client: cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4312/api npm --prefix client-app run start:e2e
scripts.e2e:stack: concurrently -k -s first -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run e2e:server" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:4312/api/health && npm run e2e:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client-app install
